title: Pattern Matching for 'instanceof' operator should be used instead of simple 'instanceof' + cast
description: Use Java's pattern matching for 'instanceof' instead of combining 'instanceof' checks with explicit casts. This improves code readability and reduces the risk of ClassCastException.
recommendation: Refactor code to use pattern matching for 'instanceof' where possible, replacing manual type checks and casts.
impact: Improves code clarity and safety by reducing boilerplate and potential casting errors.

checks.message: Refactor code to use pattern matching for 'instanceof' where possible, replacing manual type checks and casts.
